name: OMOP Wide Table Source
shortDescription: Export a wide-format view of your granted OMOP cohort data
description: Builds a wide-format table from your approved access request: one row per subject-visit, one column per source field. Name one dataset to export just that one, several to join them into a single sheet, or none to join every dataset your request grants. Authenticates as the user who ran the pipeline using the API key injected by Argo (no credentials stored in the pipeline), and stores the result as Parquet for downstream nodes.

name.label: Name
name.description: Unique identifier for this node in the pipeline

access_request.label: Use Case
access_request.description: Pick one of your approved access requests. Its use case is shown here; the request id is stored and used when the pipeline runs.

datasets.label: Datasets
datasets.description: Dataset names to export, exactly as they appear in the concept catalog (e.g. AFT). Add several to join them into one sheet, or add none to export every dataset your request grants.
datasets.placeholder: e.g. AFT — add none for all granted datasets

cohort.label: Cohort
cohort.description: Export a single cohort, which drops the Cohort column. Leave blank to export every cohort your request grants, with a Cohort column naming each.

outputDescription: Wide-format table: one row per subject-visit, one column per source field, as Parquet
